description: A project manager sees an alert that the lead electrician is allocated to work 16 hours in a single day. This over-allocation must be resolved.

nodes.task_description: Identify the tasks the lead electrician is assigned to on the specified day.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the electrician is assigned to two different 8-hour tasks simultaneously.

nodes.task_description: Reschedule one of the conflicting tasks to the following day to resolve the over-allocation.

expected_outcome.expected: The schedule is adjusted so the electrician is no longer over-allocated.
